---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(psych)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(powertools)
```
Power Analysis for Aim 1:

```{r}
df <- read.csv("Project 2/Data Raw/PrelimData.csv")
```

```{r}
vars <- df[, c("IL_6", "MCP_1", "CORT_CNG3", "CVLT_CNG3")]

res <- corr.test(vars)

# Extract results
r_mat <- round(res$r, 2)
r_mat[upper.tri(r_mat)] <- ""

kable(r_mat,
      caption = "Correlation Matrix",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      align = "c") %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))
```

```{r}
# correlations
r_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.7, by = 0.1)

# alpha levels
alphas <- c(0.05/6, 0.05/4, 0.05/24)
alpha_labels <- c("0.05/6", "0.05/4", "0.05/24")

# empty results object
results <- data.frame()

for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
  for (r in r_vals) {
    
    test <- corr.1samp(
      N = 175,
      rho0 = 0,
      rhoA = r,
      alpha = alphas[a],
      sides = 2
    )
    
    results <- rbind(
      results,
      data.frame(
        r = r,
        alpha = alpha_labels[a],
        power = test
      )
    )
  }
}

results

```


Power Analysis for Aim 2:
```{r}
# correlations
r_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.7, by = 0.1)

#difference in correlations
delta_rho_vals <- seq(0.2, 0.6, by = 0.1)

# alpha levels
alphas <- c(0.05/6, 0.05/4, 0.05/24)
alpha_labels <- c("0.05/6", "0.05/4", "0.05/24")

#low/high amyloid ratio
nratio_vals <- c(0.5, 0.75, 1, 1.25, 1.5)

# maximum total sample size
N_max <- 175

# empty results object
results <- data.frame()

for (a in seq_along(alphas)) {
  for (delta_rho in delta_rho_vals) {
    for (i in seq_along(rho1_vals)) {
      
      rho1 <- rho1_vals[i]
      rho2 <- rho1 - delta_rho  #
      
      # skip impossible correlations (< -1)
      if (rho2 < -1) next
      
      for (nr in nratio_vals) {
        
        # calculate n1 and n2 based on max total N
        n1 <- round(N_max / (1 + nr))
        n2 <- N_max - n1  
        
        test <- corr.2samp(
          n1 = n1,
          n.ratio = nr,
          rho1 = rho1,
          rho2 = rho2,
          alpha = alphas[a],
          sides = 2
        )
        
        results <- rbind(
          results,
          data.frame(
            rho1 = rho1,
            rho2 = rho2,
            delta_rho = delta_rho,
            n_ratio = nr,
            n1 = n1,
            n2 = n2,
            alpha = alpha_labels[a],
            power = test
          )
        )
      }
    }
  }
}


results
```
